A resident has been found dead and the official verdict is a heart attack, but as rumours of fraud and deception abound, Alice's friend believes the matron and an obnoxious doctor may have conspired to commit murder. Whodunit, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Jane Wymark and Laura Howard(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A petty thief is impaled with a pitchfork in sleepy Midsomer Mallow, jeopardising the residents' chances of winning a 'perfect village' competition. To make matters worse, two of the judges are also killed. Murder mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Timothy West and Maggie Steed, along with an appearance by Orlando Bloom(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A farmer's murder and the crash landing of an enemy plane lead Foyle to investigate the activities of a group of land girls, and the detective begins to suspect the captured German airmen have something to hide. Stella Gonet and James Wilby guest star in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: John Barnaby arrives in Midsomer and the headmistress of an upmarket girls' boarding school wastes no time in asking him to patrol a forthcoming classic-car show. However, when the local DJ who was set to judge the vehicles is crushed to death, the detective is soon investigating his first murder case since replacing cousin Tom - and as the death toll rises, he finds himself in a perilous situation. Drama, guest starring David Warner and Samantha Bond, with Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective drama prequel takes inspiration from an episode from Oxford's real-life history, in which Nation of Islam preacher and civil rights campaigner Marcus X was invited to speak at the Oxford Union in December 1964, less than two months before his assassination in New York. Here, Morse struggles to negotiate escalating social tensions as a protest at a hair salon exposes rapidly escalating racial unrest in the heart of the city. Meanwhile, a murder at an Army base threatens to unveil long-held secrets within the regiment. Guest starring Marcus Griffiths, with Shaun Evans and Roger Allam(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: TV cameras descend on the wards to make a documentary featuring Dr Thorpe, but mayhem, chaos and disorder rear their ugly heads as the patients vie for attention. Hospital comedy, starring James Bolam, Peter Bowles and Richard Wilson(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo is convinced that a hit-and-run incident which killed a police chemist was deliberately planned, and discovers that an imprisoned corrupt cop and his son are plotting revenge(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A woman's death, apparently from natural causes, arouses Quincy's suspicion - especially as she was about to publish a kiss-and-tell book about her high-society acquaintances. The investigation leads to a possible link with a murdered literary agent in New York and a race to perform an autopsy on him before he is cremated. Jack Klugman and Garry Walberg star(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry takes a job at a strip club, while a chance meeting with an old acquaintance gives Arthur an idea to make money out of art forgeries. Vintage comedy drama, starring Dennis Waterman and George Cole(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad foils the hijacking of a security truck before attempting to learn the identity of an informer. Colin Welland guest stars in the hard-hitting police drama, alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A former agent regresses to a time when he was captured and brain-washed by the KGB into killing four of his colleagues. After escaping from a mental hospital, he sets out to resume his mission, leaving Bodie and Doyle with the task of trying to protect them. Action drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar poses as a jailbird in an attempt to learn who is responsible for organising a series of audacious mass prison escapes. Vintage drama, guest starring Donald Sutherland, with Roger Moore(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Excavations at a demolition site uncover a human skeleton encased in concrete, which leads to the reopening on an unsolved murder case from 18 years previously(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Students join the medical examiner to solve a 20-year-old murder, but the only evidence they have to go on is a single bone found buried at the site of a new university building(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A criminal escapes from Chelmsford prison protesting his innocence and hoping to get the media's help to secure a release date - so Arthur tries to make money by selling his exclusive story to the highest bidder in Fleet Street. George Cole and John Labanowski star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley and the team are confused by a chain of events that involves lethal narcotics, a series of killings and a drug addict. As they piece the clues together, Bodie and Doyle realise someone has a plan to flood the public water supply with lethal hallucenogenic drugs. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: With Haskins in Toronto, his stand-in DCI Quirk (guest star Bill Maynard) becomes obsessed with catching a gang of thieves. When information is received suggesting the crooks are about to rob a jeweller's shop, officers are poised for action, but events take an unexpected turn as the informant seemingly has a score to settle with Quirk first. Hard-hitting police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Andy, Karryn, Chris and Tom pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.desc: James Haydon presents action from Donington Park, where the 11th meeting of the season took place. With commentary by Jack Burnicle and James Whitham(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove buy and transform a BSA Bantam from a humble roadster into a trial bike. However, they soon discover it is far easier to restore than it is to sell(n)

programme.title: American Sniper (2014)
programme.desc: A Navy Seal becomes a legend to his colleagues thanks to his skills as a deadly sniper. On his return to the US following four tours of duty in Iraq, he finds living an ordinary life as a husband and father far more difficult to deal with than the demands of warfare. Biopic based on the experiences of real-life Iraq conflict veteran Chris Kyle, directed by Clint Eastwood and starring Bradley Cooper, Sienna Miller and Kyle Gallner(n)

programme.desc: Featuring Manchester United and Liverpool(n)

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2019 Highlights
programme.desc: Richard Henwood introduces the key moments from Australia v Georgia at the Shizuoka Stadium Ecopa. With commentary by Simon Ward and Danielle Waterman(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade continues his investigations into supposedly deadly freshwater creatures. From right across the Amazon there are stories of a colossal fish that is said to swallow men whole. Some call it the 'lau-lau', others the 'piraiba'. But after 20 years of criss-crossing South America, Jeremy has never seen a specimen big enough to convince him that the fishermen's tales are true. In this programme, he heads to a remote and little-known backwater of Guyana on a mission to finally track down this alleged monster(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Martin Roberts, Tracy Edwards, Debbie McGee and Duncan James pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: The Mechanic (2011)
programme.desc: A professional hitman lets his emotional detachment slip when his mentor is murdered, and puts his deadly skills to the task of getting revenge. The solitary assassin finds an ally in his teacher's son, who also yearns for vengeance and persuades the killer to teach him the tricks of the trade. Action thriller remake, starring Jason Statham, Ben Foster and Donald Sutherland(n)

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Former Arsenal and England goalkeeper David Seaman and British Superbike Champion Tommy Hill join Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey on the banks of the River Wye, where they fish for grayling, pike and the elusive barbel(n)

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi, Tom Dove and Neil Spooner go on a Croatian adventure, searching for huge king carp, culminating in them visiting the home of the Croatian carp record of 94lb(n)

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli Bell and the team are joined by Frankie Dettori ahead of Future Champions Weekend at Newmarket. Plus, a look back at last weekend's Arc de Triomphe(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos II capsized not far from the shores of the Amazon in September 1981, and many of the stricken passengers were reportedly dragged to their deaths by powerful unseen attackers. Freshwater detective Jeremy Wade attempts to identify the culprits that played a part in the river's worst-ever boating disaster, but has the trail gone cold after more than 30 years?(n)

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: An insight into motorcycling culture, presented by enthusiast Henry Cole(n)

programme.title: Columbo: The Conspirators (1978)
programme.desc: A terrorist posing as an Irish author heads a peace organization while secretly running guns for the IRA in Belfast. When he kills an arms dealer who tried to swindle him, the writer is sure he has covered his tracks - until Columbo shambles on to the scene. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Clive Revill, Jeanette Nolan and Bernard Behrens(n)

programme.title: Kelly's Heroes (1970)
programme.desc: A rebellious American soldier fighting in occupied France learns from a captive German officer the whereabouts of a fortune in Nazi gold. Recruiting the aid of three fellow soldiers, he puts together a daring plan to penetrate enemy lines to get their hands on the bullion. Second World War adventure, starring Clint Eastwood, Telly Savalas, Donald Sutherland, Don Rickles and Harry Dean Stanton(n)

programme.title: Benidorm
programme.desc: Sammy is excited after his comeback performance, and tries to persuade Monty that he is ready for an evening show - but an encounter with an obsessed fan gives him second thoughts. Meanwhile, Noreen senses the arrival of her twin sister Doreen, and Rob dashes to the airport to win back Cyd(n)

programme.title: Passenger 57 (1992)
programme.desc: After his wife is shot dead during a robbery, a cop hands in his badge and takes up a job offer from an old friend to be a security adviser for a major transatlantic airline. On the flight taking him to his new employers in Los Angeles is an international terrorist being escorted to trial by the FBI - while the prisoner's accomplices are disguised as passengers and crew and plan to hijack the plane. Action thriller, with Wesley Snipes, Bruce Payne, Tom Sizemore, Alex Datcher, Bruce Greenwood and Elizabeth Hurley(n)

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores the Georgian era in her home city of Bristol. She takes a horse-drawn carriage ride to explore Clifton's Georgian architecture, samples some of the backstreet gin that was considered a threat to civilisation, and discovers the ingenious story behind the world's first chocolate factory. She also delves into the city's links with the slave trade, uncovering horrific tales in the historical records. programme.title: Building Britain's Canals
programme.desc: Writer and historian Dan Jones examines the creation of the picturesque Kennet and Avon Canal, which was born from a murky pool of dirty deals and demanding landowners. It came into being thanks to the genius of young engineer John Rennie, whose inspiration and innovations created a waterway that linked Bristol to London. Dan discovers how Rennie plotted the canal's route using the most basic of surveying instruments and marvels at the engineering innovations that made it all possible, such as the water-powered pumping station at Claverton(n)

programme.title: The Gadget Show
programme.desc: Craig Charles and the team look at the latest gardening tech, including a robot that does the weeding, a hi-tech wood chipper, and a 120mph leafblower, while Jon Bentley tests folding electric bikes with the help of multiple BMX world champion Shanaze Reade and a group of commuters. Georgie Barratt reports on an event at the IFA tech trade show in Berlin where manufacturers display their most outlandish concepts for the future(n)

programme.title: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: The story of how fragments of a 36-foot ancient statue depicting the pharaoh Psamtik where discovered in a working class suburb of Cairo. Psamtik's 54-year reign from 664BC had been previously dismissed as a period of decline for Egypt, but the high quality of this statue has led to a reassessment of his rule. The programme reveals how he defended his country from two invasions and may have had a cultural influence on the ancient Greeks(n)

programme.title: Pompeii: The Bodies in the Basement
programme.desc: A new investigation into one of the most harrowing gravesites of the 79AD eruption, where more than 55 bodies were found cowering in a warehouse at a site that has long baffled archaeologists. While the skeletons at the back of the room have no possessions, those crowded at the front are laden with jewellery and gold - but why, in the chaos of their dying moments, were the bodies so starkly divided by wealth?(n)

programme.title: Posh Hotels with Sally & Nigel
programme.desc: The Ballyfin hotel, in Co Laois, Ireland, has been voted the best in the world, so Sally Lindsay and Nigel Havers get to sample life in a building restored to its heyday as a regency family home to the aristocracy. Nigel masters the many skills expected of a Ballyfin butler, while Sally rolls up her sleeves with the housekeeping team. However, the duo also get to live out their Downton Abbey dreams. That is, until one of Nigel's practical jokes threatens to ruin Sally's enjoyment of the high life - and also their friendship(n)

programme.title: Top of the Box
programme.desc: Matthew Kelly takes a look back at the most popular British TV programmes from a past year, beginning with 1985 and shows including 'Allo 'Allo!, Bullseye, Name that Tune and Crossroads, plus a famous interview with Prince Charles and Princess Diana on their fourth wedding anniversary - and a parody of it featuring the Spitting Image puppets(n)

When the agents discover the calling card of notorious terror cell Dragon's Tooth on the body, it becomes clear the murder has been committed as part of a wider agenda, and the team joins forces with the Department of Defence to catch the killer. American drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A prostitute and what seems to be one of her clients are gunned down in a drive-by shooting, and when it emerges that the would-be John was actually a Navy officer, Gibbs and DiNozzo realise the killings are connected Lex Tarlionas, an incomplete operation to bring justice to those responsible for an attack on a US airport in 1979, which left 100 people dead. The main suspect is a former Colombian drugs kingpin known as Tomas Orlando, and the murdered sex worker was about to hand over crucial DNA evidence that could have connected him to the crime, but now that she is dead, Gibbs and the others must find another way to finally bring Orlando in. American drama, starring Mark Harmon and David McCallum(n)

programme.title: Secrets of Underground Britain
programme.desc: Rob Bell heads to the north of England as he continues his subterranean adventure and visits two natural wonders in the Yorkshire Dales - a mile of caves encrusted throughout with waterfalls set in stone and one of Britain's deepest potholes. He then heads across the Pennines to Greater Manchester to learn how Stockport's unique geology made it an ideal location for building Britain's largest Second World War air-raid shelter, before he explores a labyrinth of 19th-century tunnels with a bizarre and mysterious purpose under Liverpool(n)

programme.title: The Great Model Railway Challenge
programme.desc: Three teams compete in the first semi-final, where they have to make designs inspired by myths, monsters, legends and fables - with two spots in the grand final up for grabs. James Richardson and Tim Shaw oversee proceedings, with the creations including the Loch Ness monster being transported by train for a rendezvous with Godzilla and King Kong, a theatrical interpretation of King Arthur's Knights of the Round Table, and a spooky child's bedroom with an enormous devil tree bursting through the floor(n)

programme.title: World's Greatest Warships
programme.desc: Charting the history of the warship from the dawn of the 20th century to the present day, drawing on expert interviews, footage and computer-generated animations. The final episode of the series focuses on the history of the aircraft carrier, which has played a vital role in nearly every British and American military engagement since the Second World War(n)

programme.title: Live Bellator
programme.desc: Melvin Manhoef v Yannick Bahati. Coverage of the light heavyweight bout at The Allianz Cloud in Milan. Dutchman Manhoef is a veteran of 48 MMA fights and 28 of his 31 wins have come via knockout, but Birmingham's Bahati will be looking to build momentum after arresting a three-fight losing streak with a submission victory over Amir Dadovic last time out. Plus, Stefano Paterno v Ashley Reece, Kane Mousah v Daniele Scatizzi and Alessio Sakara v Canaan Grigsby(n)

programme.title: The Best of Bad TV
programme.desc: The return of the documentary celebrating those moments when events on the small screen went wrong in the most spectacular ways imaginable. The highlights - or rather lowlights - include TV cook Fanny Cradock taking a competition winner to task for creating a dish that did not live up to her exacting standards, and a variety show co-starring Formula One drivers - giving James Hunt a chance to literally blow his own trumpet. There are also various talent show cock-ups, including a memorable moment when a microphone failed during Fame Academy, and plenty of soaps, music and drama disasters too, from tears in Changing Rooms to a talking dog in That's Life!(n)

programme.title: We're No Angels (1955)
programme.desc: Three convicts escape from the penal colony on notorious Devil's Island and seize a French family's shop - only to find themselves helping the storekeeper outwit his scheming relatives. Comedy, starring Humphrey Bogart, Peter Ustinov, Aldo Ray and Basil Rathbone(n)

programme.title: The Flight of the Phoenix (1965)
programme.desc: A plane crashes in the blazing heat of the desert - and as time passes, the crew and passengers realise their only chance of making it through the ordeal alive is to repair the badly damaged craft. Adventure, starring James Stewart, Richard Attenborough, Peter Finch and Ernest Borgnine(n)

programme.title: The Comancheros (1961)
programme.desc: A hard-bitten Texas Ranger joins forces with a convict and a gambler in a covert operation to run a gang of gunmen out of the territory for supplying Comanche warriors with arms and alcohol from a secret hideout in Mexico. But after infiltrating the renegades' secret camp, they have to figure out how to survive until help arrives. Western, with John Wayne, Stuart Whitman, Ina Balin, Nehemiah Persoff and Lee Marvin(n)

programme.title: Joker Interview Special
programme.desc: Star Joaquin Phoenix and writer/director Todd Phillips discuss the making of their dark dramatic take on the origin of the famous comic-book villain(n)

programme.title: X-Men 2 (2003)
programme.desc: Mutant heroes the X-Men are forced into an uneasy alliance with arch-enemy Magneto to battle a common foe. Following an attempt on the US president's life, a sinister military scientist launches a raid on Professor Xavier's school and hatches a plan to rid the world of all mutants. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Hugh Jackman, Patrick Stewart, Ian McKellen, Alan Cumming, Halle Berry and Brian Cox(n)

programme.title: The Bank Job (2008)
programme.desc: A London car dealer is persuaded by an old flame to rob a bank. The heist goes off without a hitch, leaving the crooks in possession of cash and jewels worth millions - as well as a safety deposit box containing top-secret information the government and security services are determined to keep buried. Fact-based crime thriller, starring Jason Statham and Saffron Burrows(n)

programme.title: Lawless (2012)
programme.desc: Three brothers run an underground bootlegging operation in Depression-era Virginia. However, as their criminal activities become increasingly successful, a corrupt deputy sheriff demands a cut of the profits, forcing them to fight to defend their livelihood. Crime drama, starring Shia LaBeouf, Tom Hardy, Jason Clarke, Gary Oldman and Guy Pearce(n)

programme.title: Little Men (2016)
programme.desc: A 13-year-old boy recovering from the death of his grandfather befriends the son of a Chilean woman, who rents a dress shop from his parents. When the rent on the shop is increased, it creates a bitter feud between the two families, and the boys respond by taking a vow of silence to pressure their parents into backing down. Drama, starring Greg Kinnear and Jennifer Ehle(n)

programme.title: Two Rode Together (1961)
programme.desc: The desperate relatives of people captured by Comanches many years before put pressure on the US military to bring them home. The army hires a cynical frontier marshal, who agrees to negotiate their release in return for a commission. But the townsfolk are forced to face some grim truths when he returns with just one unrecognisable captive. John Ford's Western, with James Stewart, Richard Widmark and Shirley Jones(n)

programme.title: The Dam Busters (1955)
programme.desc: The story of the destruction of the major dams in Germany's industrial heartland in the Ruhr valley in 1943, a mission that seemed impossible until engineer and scientist Barnes Wallis came up with the ingenious idea of bouncing bombs, and the pilots of 617 Squadron were trained to fly the crucial mission. Second World War drama, with Michael Redgrave, Richard Todd, Basil Sydney, Derek Farr and Ursula Jeans(n)

programme.title: Anna and the King (1999)
programme.desc: A widowed schoolmistress leaves Victorian England to tutor a son of the King of Siam, only to discover his majesty actually expects her to care for all 58 of his children. In spite of disagreements and many ups and downs, the teacher gradually forms a deep platonic love for her royal employer. Period drama, starring Jodie Foster, Chow Yun-Fat, Ling Bai, Syed Alwi, Tom Felton and Randall Duk Kim(n)

programme.title: X-Men: The Last Stand (2006)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes return to face a battle on three fronts. Arch-enemy Magneto is back with an army of followers, while a corporation has created a drug that permanently robs mutants of their powers. Meanwhile, their former ally Jean Grey has returned from the dead as the destructive and seemingly unstoppable Phoenix. The third instalment of the superhero saga, starring Hugh Jackman, Ian McKellen, Famke Janssen, Halle Berry and Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: The Day Shall Come Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Chris Morris and stars Marchant Davis and Kayvan Novak talk about making their new 'comedy with consequences'(n)

programme.title: Midnight Run (1988)
programme.desc: When accountant Jonathan Mardukas skips bail after having been arrested for embezzlement, bounty hunter Jack Walsh is hired to catch the fraudster and return him from New York to Los Angeles. Unfortunately, his task is hindered by the ingenuity of Mardukas and the attentions of pursuing FBI agents and Mafia hitmen. Comedy thriller, starring Robert De Niro, Charles Grodin, Yaphet Kotto, Dennis Farina, John Ashton and Joe Pantoliano(n)

programme.title: Nerve (2016)
programme.desc: A teenager finds herself immersed in an online game of truth or dare, where her every move starts to be manipulated by an anonymous community of watchers. Soon, the challenges she and her fellow players are set grow more dangerous, until lives are genuinely at stake. Thriller, starring Emma Roberts and Dave Franco(n)

programme.title: Prevenge (2016)
programme.desc: Following a terrible tragedy, single mum-to-be Ruth seems determined to wreak revenge on anyone who dares to undermine her or define her by her pregnancy. Egged on by the voice of her unborn baby, Ruth embarks on a series of brutal murders that appear to be unrelated, but her targets are far from spontaneously chosen. Black comedy, written, directed by and starring Alice Lowe, with Gemma Whelan, Kate Dickie and Tom Davis(n)

programme.title: Stuart Little 2 (2002)
programme.desc: The plucky talking mouse feels left out when the son of his adopted human family makes a new pal - but quickly forgets such trifling matters when his high-flying canary friend is captured by an evil falcon, prompting the brave rodent to mount a daring rescue. Family adventure sequel, with Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie and Jonathan Lipnicki, and the voices of Michael J Fox, Melanie Griffith and James Woods(n)

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth (1959)
programme.desc: An explorer discovers a prehistoric monster-infested world deep beneath Earth's crust and faces a tough ordeal escaping the predatory attacks of the creatures as he tries to guide his team back to safety. Sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novel, starring Pat Boone, James Mason, Arlene Dahl and Diane Baker(n)

programme.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown (2006)
programme.desc: Sid the sloth, Manny the mammoth and Diego the sabre-toothed tiger grimly realise the good life is about to come to an abrupt end as flood waters threaten their homes. However, a vulture suggests they could turn an old giant tree into a boat and make their escape, so the three friends set off in search of it. Animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, John Leguizamo and Denis Leary(n)

programme.title: Last Holiday (2006)

Comedy, starring Queen Latifah, Gerard Depardieu, LL Cool J, Timothy Hutton and Giancarlo Esposito(n)

programme.title: Paddington (2014)

He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bond's series of children's books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw(n)

programme.title: The Drop (2014)
programme.desc: A Brooklyn bartender secretly provides a service delivering shipments of money to local gangsters. His criminal connections lead to his involvement in a robbery that goes disastrously wrong and digs up the long-buried secrets from his neighbourhood's past. Crime drama based on a short story by Dennis Lehane, starring Tom Hardy, Noomi Rapace and James Gandolfini in his final film role(n)

programme.title: Warrior (2011)
programme.desc: Two estranged brothers are drawn to enter a mixed martial arts tournament, one a military veteran looking for a way to escape his troubled past, the other a struggling teacher who needs the prize money to support his family. As they progress through the contest, both emerge as likely winners - putting them on course to face each other in the final. Drama, with Joel Edgerton, Tom Hardy and Nick Nolte(n)

programme.desc: Joe is furious when he finds out that Dani had some older friends over to the house who drank his expensive bottle of wine, but wonders whether she is being totally honest with him about the event. programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Baby Daddy

With their wedding just weeks away, the pair have £100,000 to find somewhere that will accommodate a future mother-in-law as well as five visiting children(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Farhalls in Windsor, who are unsure whether to sell their four-bed detached house or transform the layout of their home. Graham loves living in Windsor, but Nardeth is growing tired of their cramped and dated house, and would prefer to look for a new property they could purchase(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick helps Erin and JB fix the rusty hinges on their solarium doors. Tim and Margareeth decide to launch a foodie weekend, and May and Jack prepare the yoga room for guests(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Zumba teacher Amanda hosts the first dinner party in Weston-super-Mare, where she hopes to impress her guests Harry, drama teacher Nancy, businesswoman Tracy and estate manager Chris with a locally sourced Somerset menu. Although the evening starts off with some friendly banter, it soon turns sour for some of the contestants(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rugby fan and sports centre manager Harry hosts the second night in Weston-super-Mare, where he hopes to wow his guests with a traditional Hungarian menu, complete with beef in hunter's sauce and bird's milk with meringue dumplings(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Weston-super-Mare, drama teacher and music lover Nancy throws an Austrian-themed party to reflect her love of the country and its music, with a menu featuring wiener schnitzel and venison stew. The starter proves to be a hit with the guests, but her main course fails to impress, and the atmosphere grows tense when Chris compares her dessert to the worst food experience of his life(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farm-estate manager Chris hosts the fourth party in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset, and hopes his African-based menu can impress his guests. He serves savoury doughnuts, which are a new experience for his fellow diners. However, his main course of deep fried beef doesn't go down as well, leaving his chances of winning the competition resting on the evening's entertainment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businesswoman Tracy hosts the final dinner party in Weston-super-Mare, and her dance-inspired evening includes lessons in cha-cha and tango as well as a black-tie dress code. Her guests tuck into a main course of steak cooked to each person's taste, which proves difficult to co-ordinate(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole restores a petrol pump and turns a hubcap into a clock, and Simon O'Brien repurposes a copper immersion heater into a stylish wash basin(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the hidden lives of the animals of Chester Zoo. The Asian elephant family welcome a new arrival. Grumpy matriarch Thi has been pregnant for almost two years and is reaching the end of her tether. She's given birth to a stillborn baby in the past, so the keepers have a close eye on her. Cameras also follow Red panda Jung, who has been getting the cold shoulder from his partner Nima since they had two cubs(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pioneering veterinarian Noel Fitzpatrick plans to use groundbreaking cell technology to repair damaged cartilage in a 10-month-old golden retriever that helps a five-year-old girl cope with epilepsy. A cat arrives at the surgery with a suspected rat bite that seems to be getting bigger, and a whippet is brought in after being hit by a car - sustaining multiple pelvic fractures(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs Revisited
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits Helen Gould and Phil Reddy five years after they built an earth-sheltered home in Cumbria. The presenter finds out if the house has survived without water leaking in and whether it has delivered the eco-friendly life the couple desired(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick, Angel and the family move into their crumbling chateau, which they find they will be sharing with bats, birds and thousands of flies(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Reynolds begins to build his department as Dr Sharpe battles scepticism from a patient's parents. Max helps Bloom find a solution for a pregnant patient in a tough spot(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The trauma team at St George's Hospital in south-west London fights to save the life of a young woman involved in a motorbike accident, which has completely severed her right leg below the knee. An 11-year-old boy is brought in after having a prolonged epileptic seizure, and a 19-year-old arrives with a sewing needle stuck in her foot, but she seems more keen on taking advice from her mum in Bulgaria than from the doctor(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Paramedics across Britain treat patients fighting for their lives. In Nottingham, Selina Conway is dispatched to a 76-year-old man who has collapsed in his garden, while Liam Wakefield heads to the home of an 18-year-old who has stopped breathing. In Essex, Sadie Bentley and recently qualified Anna Tansley are called by the coastguard to help resuscitate a man found floating in the sea(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Reynolds begins to build his department as Dr Sharpe battles scepticism from a patient's parents. Max helps Bloom find a solution for a pregnant patient in a tough spot(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It

Karl loves the unique design and idyllic location, but Paul thinks they are too isolated, and would rather move to another area than spend the moving improving their current home(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB launch their chateau business by opening it up for a tea party for the locals, including the mayor. May holds her health and wellbeing retreat using her new yoga studio for the first time(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Council manager Charlotte hosts the first dinner party in Llanelli, Carmarthenshire, where she hopes to impress electrician Steve, occupational nurse Christine, retired French teacher Meic, and teaching assistant Ainsley with an evening that features a former rugby choir as entertainment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Electrician Steve hosts the second night of the competition in Llanelli, Carmarthenshire, and hopes that his menu of lasagne, vegetable soup and homemade wine will impress his guests and win him the £1,000 prize. As the evening goes on, Meic decides to bare all with a revelation that shocks Christine(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Occupational nurse Christine hosts the third dinner party in Llanelli, where she tries to impress her guests with a menu of family favourites and a performance by her number one rock band. Charlotte and Meic stumble across the host's messy office, and trouble brews when Ainsley tells Christine that she looks like one of her exes(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired French teacher Meic hosts the fourth night of the competition in Llanelli, Carmarthenshire, and plans an authentic French menu including poulet Basquaise. Fellow diner Charlotte makes an impression when she arrives wearing an onion necklace, and the host hopes that his specially branded cremes brulees will impress his guests(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final day of the competition in Llanelli, and the turn of teaching assistant Ainsley to host. She wants to educate her guests, while serving an authentic Russian-themed dinner party. However, vodka-infused pavlova and some dancing may not be enough to offset the cantankerous mood at the dinner table(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a Yorkshire textile mill, where Simon repurposes a mill trolley into a coffee table and Henry struggles to repair a Soviet-era motorbike(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester's Penguin Island is home to one of the most enduring love stories in the zoo. At 22, Rud is the oldest on the island, and has been with his partner, Spike, for over 15 years. However, keepers are concerned that Rud's arthritic hip could be affecting his quality of life. Meanwhile, the Sumatran tigers are upgrading to a luxury new enclosure on the other side of the zoo as part of Chester's huge expansion. But they've lived in their home for most of their lives so it's not going to be an easy move(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: The odds are stacked against Noel Fitzpatrick and his team as a golden retriever puppy with horrific facial injuries is brought into the practice after being attacked by another dog. Plus, a man drives all the way from Switzerland in the hope of a successful treatment for a Chihuahua, and a woman brings in her Hungarian vizsla, which has a bone and cartilage disorder(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs Revisited
programme.desc: An update on Kelly and Masoko Neville, who built an oak-framed, straw-baled hexagonal home in the Cambridgeshire Fens in 2005. The unusual two-storey house was built around a spiral staircase carved out of an 800-year-old tree trunk, the centrepiece of an interior that drew inspiration from JRR Tolkien's The Hobbit. Kevin McCloud visits the Nevilles to see if they have managed to find the idyllic, self-sufficient life they craved(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

Dick oversees the damming of the moat and the installation of a new, eco-friendly sewage system, while Angel turns her attention to giving the rooms a distinctive decor(n)

programme.title: Thou Shalt Not Kill
programme.desc: Musician Irene Ferrara plays at a classical concert on the night that she's killed. A talented and beautiful young woman, she was the first violin in a noted orchestra and the daughter of Adele Rubini, the owner of a prestigious theatre. Determined police officer Valeria Ferro considers who would want her dead - and why? In Italian(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. Teacher Dave, 53, has facial injuries after riding his new bicycle into the back of a stationary car in Richmond Park, while 30-year-old adrenaline junkie and former Royal Marine Richard has badly dislocated his thumb after falling off a bike(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Former boxer Paul, 22, has been stabbed in the face and arm with a broken bottle outside a nightclub in Kingston. As the team works to stop the bleeding and treat the patient's wounds, his girlfriend Naveena reflects on his sensitive side. Angela, 93, is brought to A&E by her daughter Elizabeth after suffering from blood loss and disorientation at her care home, while 70-year-old John arrives with his wife Francesca after falling while out running and dislocating his shoulder. To get John's pain under control quickly the medics give him ketamine, and the hallucinogenic side effects keep everyone entertained(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates supermarkets' stringent criteria for the perfect vegetable, and the incredible lengths to which farmers go to grow produce that looks more attractive. In America, Kate Quiton examines why wine is getting stronger and learns about a machine that has been removing excess alcohol from some Californian wines since the 1990s. Matt Tebbutt takes on the ultimate tea-break challenge as he tries to settle an age-old dispute once and for all: which biscuit is best for dunking?(n)

programme.desc: In this bite-sized episode, Ellie and Nick Harrington are desperate to revamp their neglected kitchen and dining room in their Tunbridge Wells home. Kirstie Allsopp heads to Kent, where the couple are given a wicker class to help them create the 1930s style they want(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Dave and Toby, who have been friends since childhood, search for a party house in northern Granada, Spain, with their joint budget of £27,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Hope Mountain in Cymau, Flintshire, where husband and wife team Rob and Jo Smith hope their dog-friendly B&B will win the day(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day in the competition sees the B&B owners meet up for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: New Zealander Steve Levy kicks off a week of dinner parties in Exeter, where he hopes his home-inspired menu consisting of a prawn starter, a fish main course and two desserts will impress his guests - administrator Estelle Macrow, media sales executive Richard Kaye, customer services adviser Sarah Wallis and PR guru Glen King - and make him an early contender for the £1,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Media sales executive and music mad foodie Richard Kaye hosts the second dinner party in Exeter, where he is confident he can impress his guests with his culinary knowledge, and hopes to dazzle one diner in particular(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Self-assured PR worker Glen King is confident she will be the 'hostess with the mostest' in Exeter, and has gone all-out to impress - even co-ordinating the dishes with her surname. She appears to be unflappable in the kitchen and seems to have a plan for everything to fall perfectly into place - but will it?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer services adviser Sarah Wallis is the fourth host in Exeter, and despite holding back all week she hopes to come out of her shell with an evening full of humour. The guests are welcomed in a terrifying manner, before being served some rather unusual cocktails(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline

An octogenarian couple are rushed in to A&E after being knocked over by a motorcyclist while crossing the road, and the police maintain an active presence as paramedics bring in a man who has collapsed after a suspected drug overdose. Plus, an 88-year-old woman with a swollen leg discusses her ill-fated marriage to a much younger man nearly four decades ago(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Pub landlord Tony is brought in with burnt legs as a result of his barbecue gas cylinder exploding - made slightly worse by the fact he was only wearing boxer shorts at the time. Henry, a 93-year-old war veteran, is rushed in with severe breathing difficulties, and builder Bill was knocked unconscious after falling off his shed. His CT scan reveals he has broken his neck in three places, and he may need surgery to avoid damage to his spinal cord(n)

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Clare Grogan guest stars as a feminist protest singer who visits Craggy Island and talks gormless Dougal into giving her the parochial house while Ted is out judging a local beauty contest. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan(n)

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.desc: Radio presenter Samantha M has her heart set on a convertible, and both Elo and Rebecca have looked to German brands for ideas, including BMW, Mercedes and Porsche(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May immerse themselves in nostalgia and try to prove that hot hatches from their younger days are better than today's equivalents. Jeremy grabs the keys to a Volkswagen Golf GTI, Richard takes the wheel of a Vauxhall Nova SRi and James May opts for the Ford Fiesta XR2i, and the trio set off on a road trip that includes a hill climb and a visit to a supermarket. However, their adventure concludes at an army training ground in Wales, where they and their steeds must face the heavily armed Top Gear Police Department. Downton Abbey star Hugh Bonneville blasts the Reasonably Priced Car around the test track(n)

programme.title: Cops UK: Bodycam Squad
programme.desc: Officers of Staffordshire Police are presented with a challenging situation in Burton when a late night reveller decides to go for an impromptu swim in the River Trent(n)

programme.title: Modern Wheels or Classic Steals
programme.desc: Two classic and two modern convertibles are pitted against each other, as Elo and Rebecca try to find something stylish and sexy to meet Katie's requirements(n)

programme.title: Modern Wheels or Classic Steals
programme.desc: Rebecca Jackson and Elo help a car buyer look for the perfect 4x4, and the vehicle must be suitable for the buyer's canine companions(n)

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Peter meets his match with a client. Beat and Andre trade a viewing platform for Motocross lessons, and Brian creates the tree fort of his childhood dreams(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond gets behind the wheel of the mid-engined Alfa Romeo 4C on the shores of Lake Como in Italy - but his enjoyment of the lightweight vehicle is disturbed by the arrival of Jeremy Clarkson, who demands a race against his quad bike. Jeremy also visits Belgium, putting the McLaren P1 hypercar to the test in Bruges and around the Spa-Francorchamps Formula One circuit - and its combined power output of more than 900bhp generated from electricity and turbocharged petrol V8 power is likely to cause astonishment. Meanwhile, James May spends time at Camp Bastion in Afghanistan to learn about the army's vehicle redeployment efforts, and Thor star Tom Hiddleston tries to coax the best time he can muster from the Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The three petrolheads demonstrate their love of small cars with a trip to Ukraine. Jeremy Clarkson chooses a Volkswagen Up for the journey, while Richard Hammond takes a Ford Fiesta and James May opts for a Dacia Sandero. On their adventure, the trio absorb the history of the Crimean Peninsula, including a visit to an old submarine pen - but the carefree exploration looks likely to become a chore when Jeremy, Richard and James are challenged to a long drive north through the expansive country, during which they must combat serious boredom. And as if that wasn't arduous enough, a new task is set when they arrive in Kiev - a trip into the wasteland of Chernobyl. This edition also features a track test of the Danish Zenvo ST1 supercar and James Blunt returns for another drive in the Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sally Phillips, Ross Noble and Nish Kumar join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig for an extended version of the comedy quiz show. This time, the topic is 'Odorous and Odious'. During the course of the show, the panellists learn why the world's second-smelliest man is so frustrated. As ever, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window, as the fiendishly difficult questions lead to points being awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting, as opposed to correct(n)

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: David Tennant hosts the satirical news quiz, with guests Phil Wang and Janet Street-Porter joining team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton(n)

programme.title: Superbad (2007)
programme.desc: Two teenage friends are on the brink of going to different colleges, so decide to mark the event by going to a party where they hope to lose their virginity. However, they have promised to supply the booze for the event, a task that proves much harder than expected because they are under age. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill, Michael Cera and Christopher Mintz-Plasse(n)

programme.desc: Josh races to get into position with film-maker Caroline as Hurricane Willa barrels towards Sinaloa in western Mexico, while James faces an agonising decision over his own safety(n)

programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams headed by David Mitchell and Lee Mack try to hoodwink each other with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Comedian and actor Miles Jupp, chef extraordinaire Heston Blumenthal, actress Emilia Fox and funnyman Ed Byrne are this week's guests(n)

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams of celebs try to call each other's bluff with a few stories about themselves that may be the truth or may be out-and-out porkies. programme.title: The Expendables (2010)
programme.desc: A mercenary leads his elite team on a mission to assassinate a South American dictator, only to find their target is merely a pawn and the real power in the country is a rogue CIA agent. With Jason Statham and Jet Li(n)

programme.title: Machines of War
programme.desc: The history of tanks, from the First World War to the most sophisticated modern armoured vehicles(n)

programme.title: Machines of War
programme.desc: The history of the machine gun from the First World War to the world's deadliest modern automatic weapons, including the use of Tommy Guns in organised crime(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team try to piece together the complete picture of the Manor of the More, a once impressive structure masterminded by Henry VIII's right-hand man, Cardinal Wolsey. The palace had been forgotten about until the 1950s, when a group of pupils at Northwood School in Hertfordshire discovered its remains beneath a playing field. One of them joins the team on an adventure of discovery, observing remains dating back to the 16th century(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: The team investigates acres of overgrown gardens surrounding Upton Castle in Pembrokeshire, the centre of a romantic mystery for owners Steve and Pru Barlow. The pair bought what looked like a medieval castle at the front and a Victorian mansion at the back, leaving the origins of the complex unclear. The group digs trenches to look for a courtyard, while building specialists crawl through the roof and an excavation for the remains of a drawbridge takes place. Presented by Tony Robinson(n)

programme.title: Nazi Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: The theories surrounding the death of Hermann Goering, who managed to cheat the hangman by taking a cyanide capsule on the day before his scheduled death(n)

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: How engineers have built railways across mountains, including tunnels through the Swiss Alps and an Australian track that runs up a near-vertical cliff face(n)

programme.title: Ocean Giants
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the lives of the planet's largest marine mammals and the secrets of their survival. Cameramen Doug Allan and Didier Noirot travel from the Indian Ocean to the Arctic seas, filming 200-ton blue whales and fighting humpbacks. The team also discovers that southern right whales possess a pair of one-ton testicles and reveals how Arctic bowheads can live to be more than 200 years old. Narrated by Stephen Fry(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Wildlife that inhabit the world's grasslands, areas that are struck by some of the most dramatic seasonal changes seen in the world. The programme features footage of Brazil's giant anteaters and Asian saiga antelope, as well as lions engaging in ferocious battles with buffalo in the flooded Okavango, bee-eaters taking advantage of elephants to help them catch insects, and caribou embarking on migrations across the freezing northern tundra, stalked every step of the way by predatory Arctic wolves(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek dives into the lost Jowett marque, as a Bradford-built 1952 Javelin finds an unexpected home. Paul and Dave uncover a Ford Escort that's been untouched for 30 years(n)

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The creation of London's Crossrail network, a project of staggering proportions, with 10,000 personnel working across 40 sites and on 118km of track. The focus should have been on the impressive engineering feat, though delays and budgets have become the focus of attention(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The programme looks at a mysterious group of rusting ships stranded in an arid desert, and a monstrous defensive line on the snow-covered peaks of the Italian Alps(n)

programme.title: After Hitler
programme.desc: The conclusion of the two-part documentary examines the Nuremberg Trials, the division of Germany, and the founding of the United Nations(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson celebrates the many practical experiments and re-creations that he and the team have conducted over 20 years to unlock the mysteries exposed by their digs. The programme revisits some memorable highlights from shows of yesteryear, from making individual objects like Stone Age axes, Roman pewter bowls, medieval pottery and King Arthur's sword, to building an entire Iron Age house and a Roman machine to lift water from a deep well(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: In a special 20th anniversary celebration for the programme, Tony Robinson relives the best bits from more than 200 episodes, taking in major highlights such as digging up the garden of Buckingham Palace to reveal a crashed Spitfire and discovering the first stone circle to be found in Britain for 150 years. There is a reminder of how the show grew from nervous beginnings in a Somerset field into attempting city-wide digs and promoting nationwide events in which thousands of people spent the weekend digging in their own backyards(n)

programme.title: Nazi Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: The theories, conspiracies and facts relating to Rudolf Hess's dramatic flight to Scotland in 1941 and his subsequent death in Spandau prison(n)

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: Unusual rail networks designed to traverse water, including the Indian Ocean, the earthquake zones of the Bosphorus Strait and the sea cliffs of the Italian Riviera(n)

programme.title: Ocean Giants
programme.desc: The documentary explores the intelligence of marine mammals, discovering just how smart whales and dolphins really are. Scientist Denise Herzing talks about the development of a two-way communication system between dolphins and humans in the Bahamas, while in Western Australia the creatures are filmed using a range of survival skills. In Mexico, grey whales seemingly empathise with humans, while the humpbacks of Alaska pool their talents to increase hunting success. Narrated by Stephen Fry(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Footage of wild animals that have made a home in cities, including leopards on the streets of Mumbai, peregrine falcons hunting among New York's skyscrapers, hyenas that live peacefully alongside the people of Harar, macaques in Jaipur, and langurs in Jodhpur, which are regarded as having great religious significance by the citizens. The programme also examines how some animals are struggling to survive in urban environments, and questions how cities can be built to serve their needs as well as those of the human inhabitants(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1970s Bond Bug three-wheeler divides opinion among Mathewsons customers, while a retired engineer reluctantly auctions off his late father's treasured 60s Jaguar Mark 2(n)

programme.title: Deep Wreck Mysteries
programme.desc: The remains of three U-boats discovered in the Bristol Channel. Their exact identity and how they came to be there is not known, so divers explore the wrecks and with the help of British and German experts reveal the mystery submarines. Series investigating deep-sea wrecks off the south-west coast of England(n)

programme.title: Titanic: Stories from the Deep
programme.desc: Thanks to the use of cutting-edge technology, a unique collection of artefacts salvaged from the underwater resting site of the famous wreck suggest new stories of love, deception, fate and heroics. This first episode touches on Fifth Officer Harold Lowe. After Titanic sank, his lifeboat was one of the few to go back and pick up survivors. One of the people he saved, Renee Harris, gifted him a set of gold-plated nautical equipment as a symbol of her gratitude. Plus, a well-preserved alligator bag recovered from the wreck site containing fascinating clues about the life of its owner(n)

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: First hand accounts of America's opening air raid on the Japanese archipelago, led by Colonel Jimmy Doolittle(n)

programme.title: WW2 Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: The documentary concludes with a look at a 1943 crash in Gibraltar, which killed General Wladyslaw Sikorski, the Prime Minister of Poland's London-based government. Presenter Garth Barnard investigates many of the unanswered questions from the tragedy, including why the pilot was wearing a life jacket and why many of the bodies believed to be on the plane were never found, and asks whether the accident could have actually been an assassination(n)

programme.title: WW2 Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: Garth Barnard investigates how thousands of soldiers during the Second World War died in catastrophic air accidents and tragic training crashes. In the first edition, he tries to uncover what happened on board a B-25 Mitchell Bomber that crashed into Sharp Top mountain in Virginia in 1943, resulting in the deaths of five people(n)

programme.title: A Tale of Two Sisters
programme.desc: The relationship between the queen and her younger sister, revealing how their contrasting personalities have shaped the British monarchy(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston travels to Jerusalem in search of Solomon's Temple. When the Romans sacked the city in 70AD, the fabled Treasure of Solomons was believed to have been looted and taken back to Rome. However, it is possible it was hidden away by the High Priests. Archaeologists Dr Shimon Gibson and Kate Raphael have dedicated their lives working out what actually happened, and discuss whether it is possible that Solomonic and Roman treasures lie undiscovered under Jerusalem(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston talks to author Joy Hancox about the alchemical roots of London, the design of famous buildings such as The Globe theatre and the mysterious figure of English poet John Byrom. He also meets a modern day potion-maker(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The documentary exploring historical mysteries returns, beginning with Jamie Theakston looking at the lost city of Petra in Jordan. The presenter questions whether any treasures still lie beneath the site in hidden tombs, and enlists the help of local historians(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston investigates one of history's most enduring mysteries as he goes on a world-wide search for the Holy Grail, visiting Glastonbury in Somerset, Wales, Valencia in Spain, and New York City to inspect four goblets that could be the ancient relic(n)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough takes a look at gorillas and vampire bats, two species that have unfairly gained unpleasant reputation within the animal kingdom(n)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist reflects on the remarkable abilities that some plants and animals possess, such as the electric eel that helped inspire the battery and flowers that 'talk' to bees using electrical signals(n)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines the emperor penguin and the wood frog, both of which survive in conditions so cold they seem to defy the laws of nature. The emperor is the only penguin able to breed on Antarctic sea ice during winter, while the wood frog can survive up to 65 per cent of its body mass freezing during its hibernation(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sherry and her partner Phil kick-off the contest in Oxfordshire, with a traditional menu with a modern twist served in their grand dining room. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Animal rights activists are implicated in the death of an Aids researcher killed by a bite from an infected monkey, and use the ensuing court case to drum up support for their cause. As events unfold, McCoy and Carmichael find themselves debating ethics with lawyers who argue the protection of animal life is a valid defence in a murder case(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's body is found in a Central Park lake during a Puerto Rican Day parade. The victim turns out to be the wife of a powerful billionaire, and pressure is put on the police to find the culprit quickly. Suspicion falls on the business partner of the victim's husband and a witness comes forward to identify him, making everything seem clear cut - but not for long(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends the funeral of an old friend, whose former lover interrupts the service to insist he did not die of a heart attack, as the medical examiner's report claims, but was actually murdered. When the corpse is found to have been misidentified and a large sum of investment money goes missing from the town, the sleuth agrees that something far more complex is going on. Starring Angela Lansbury, Tom Bosley, Carrie Snodgress and Audrey Landers(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is upset when she learns that a short story of hers will appear in a magazine that has become known for its racy pictures of young women. Things take a dark turn when the publisher is found murdered and the sleuth finds herself investigating his mysterious death. Starring Angela Lansbury, Robert Stack and Bert Convy(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a student who proves to be the estranged son of a powerful real-estate tycoon. The finger of blame points to a mystery woman seen with the victim outside the college, and when tracked down, she claims to be his sister. However, Briscoe is not convinced, and suspects an extortion scheme(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are convinced that former career criminal Cally Lonegan has killed his business partner who had been stealing company money. However, their suspect has a cast iron alibi - he is a Mob informant and at the time of the murder was being followed by the FBI. The case takes a more complicated turn when an eyewitness is found dead and the detectives discover Lonegan has a twin brother(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An enigmatic killer shoots dead a businessman spending Thanksgiving at a hotel in the city, then takes his glasses, jewellery and ID to Washington Dulles airport, which has been brought to a stand-still by a massive snowstorm. As the murderer's actions take effect, a terror alert is issued, leaving all northern US airports in a state of panic, and leaving it up to DiNozzo, Bishop and her husband - all of whom are trapped at Dulles by the weather - to bring the armed villain to justice. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherley(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: When a mayoral candidate is shot after making a speech, the motive is found to be personal not political, and the team deduces that the perpetrator missed his true target(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Annette Fox is walking down the street with her daughter Jenna when a man in a dark hoodie snatches her purse before shooting her in the head, killing her. Annette had been due to testify in a rape case against high-profile hairdresser Luke Ronson, who swears to Benson and Stabler that he was helping out at a homeless shelter at the time. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An African immigrant working as a maid accuses an Italian diplomat of rape, but the man hires some heavyweight lawyers to discredit her story by revealing a fabricated detail on her asylum application. A fellow maid brings the woman into further disrepute, but Benson is still inclined to believe the story. Meanwhile, Stabler's future remains in doubt. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate after Larissa Welsh's boyfriend returns home to find her unconscious, tied to a chair, covered in razor cuts and wearing nothing but some underwear labelled 'Brandy', before a naked man jumps out and attacks him. Back at headquarters, Munch and Fin search for similar cases and discover two girls have been attacked in the same manner, and further evidence points toward the existence of a paedophile ring. Guest starring Taryn Manning (Orange Is the New Black, Hawaii Five-0)(n)

programme.title: Chicago Fire

Meanwhile, Clarke comes face to face with two armed robbers at a supermarket, Katie considers moving to New York for a job and Casey lies to Dawson about his headaches and memory loss(n)

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: With Katie's whereabouts still unknown, Kelly interrogates Vince - the man who threatened him during the blackout - but he's stopped in his tracks by Detective Lindsay, who tells him to let the professionals do their job. As hours turn into days and with still no sign of his sister, the firefighter decides to take matters into his own hands. Casey knows passing her medical check-up is essential if she's to continue with her training, so she lies about the doctor's diagnosis(n)

programme.title: Chicago Fire

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a woman killed in what appears to be a road rage incident. However, as they retrace her last actions, they suspect she was accidentally murdered by an assassin following the wrong car. programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee deals with his father's recent death by writing him a letter outlining the details of his latest investigation. The case involved tracking down a hactivist collective known as Krampus, who were thought to have been responsible for an incident in which the internet crashed all over Washington, DC. McGee and Abby brought in three known cyber-terrorists for questioning, and discover evidence that links the trio to an attempted breach of the Congress e-mail server and archive. However, when this line of inquiry reaches a dead-end, the team picks up a new lead that suggests an isolated hacker from Wisconsin may be responsible. This 'lone wolf' scenario does not seem plausible to McGee, though, as he recalls a lesson his late father taught him. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray(n)

programme.title: Perception

programme.desc: Detectives Briscoe and Green try to discover the identity of a masked youngster who opened fire on classmates, killing four and wounding several others. programme.title: Jamie's School Dinners
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver begins his campaign to encourage healthy eating at Kidbrooke School in Greenwich by teaching the children to cook, persuading a mother of nine to try his recipes and even dressing up as a giant sweetcorn. He also takes a trip to Durham, officially Britain's unhealthiest county, where he teaches a primary class about food and receives some disquieting news from a local dietician(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a second home abroad(n)

programme.desc: Francine Lewis and Simon Gross travel around London on an afternoon tea bus interviewing their celebrity pals(n)

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Homeowners work to increase the value of their properties, redesigning and refurbishing for maximum profits(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, psychiatry has treated voices and hallucinations as an enemy. But today new scientific and psychological insights into how the brain works are leading to a radical rethink on what such experiences are - and how they should be treated. Cameras follow three people living with voices, hallucinations and paranoia, to explore what causes this kind of phenomena(n)

programme.title: The Long Memory (1952)
programme.desc: A man is released from prison after serving a 12-year sentence for a crime he did not commit, and immediately sets about tracking down three witnesses who lied in court, bringing about his conviction. However, while seeking revenge, he discovers the case is more complicated than expected. Thriller, starring John Mills, Elizabeth Sellars, John McCallum and Geoffrey Keen(n)

programme.title: The One That Got Away (1957)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War adventure about a German pilot who repeatedly escaped from British prison camps. Transferred to Montreal, he managed to break out and cross the border into America in a bid to rejoin his squadron. Starring Hardy Kruger, Michael Goodliffe, Colin Gordon and Terence Alexander(n)

programme.title: Jamie's School Dinners
programme.desc: The dinner ladies threaten to walk out as Jamie Oliver calls on their services to cook unfamiliar food from scratch and provide more than 20,000 dinners across one London borough. His bid to prove the new regimen will work on a large scale leaves the children initially suspicious of his food, but the time has come to tackle the government about school meals(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: The work and theories of researchers who have studied psychopathic killers. Professor Jim Fallon talks about how he discovered he had the profile of a psychopath, but explains how the fact he did not become a murderer holds important lessons. Another scientist discusses his belief he has found a molecule related to morality, which is being used to rewrite ideas of crime and punishment(n)

programme.title: The Conversations (2016)
programme.desc: A disillusioned dentist tries to become a stand-up comic, but finds he is unable to perform on stage due to his unrequited love for an American woman who is about to return to the States, never to be seen again. In desperation he seeks a way to have her permanently erased from his memory. Comedy drama, starring Haider Zafar and Daniella Down(n)

programme.title: The C Word
programme.desc: Sheridan Smith stars in this drama based on the blog and book by Lisa Lynch, an account of her life after being diagnosed with breast cancer. Twenty-eight-year-old Lisa's life is going exactly the way she wanted - she has recently married the man of her dreams and her career is on the up. Then out of the blue, she receives a shocking a diagnosis from the doctor that threatens to stop her in her tracks. Right from the start, however, Lisa is determined not to let cancer change her, and begins to write about her experience - unaware of the effect it will have on her life and that of others. Paul Nicholls, Haydn Gwynne and Michael Maloney co-star(n)

programme.title: The Repo Man
programme.desc: In recession-hit Britain, many people have turned to finance companies to purchase items over a fixed period of time. This documentary follows the life and work of bailiff Sean James as he confronts debtors across the nation who fail to keep up their repayments(n)

programme.title: Modern Times
programme.desc: Documentary about the characters who live and work in the area of central London, which is famous for being the most coveted square on the Monopoly board and is home to Claridge's hotel and Christie's auction house. The film reveals a world of surprises and deep contrasts, including an estate agent selling multimillion-pound mansions, cafe owners hanging on to their livelihoods by their fingernails, an NHS doctor whose patients range from billionaires to people on benefits, an upmarket resident who dresses in Victorian clothing and a cabbie living in social housing(n)

programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present as another selection of celebrities take part in the general knowledge quiz. This time, the duo open the contest to famous faces who made a name for themselves early in life. Outnumbered's Tyger Drew-Honey teams up with This Is England's Thomas Turgoose, while Willy Wonka & the Chocolate Factory's Julie Dawn Cole joins forces with Oliver! star Mark Lester. Plus, former Grange Hill stars Lee MacDonald and Erkan Mustafa take on old classmate Michelle Gayle as she partners ex-Coronation Street actor Adam Rickitt(n)

programme.title: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: Nick Knowles presents the challenge of general knowledge and nerve as teams compete to create the longest lists on any given subject from Beatles hits to Wimbledon Champions. Here, a freelance illustrator and a mathematician researcher take on last week's winners for the chance to play for up to £50,000 and the opportunity to add to the successful sequence next time. Jenni Falconer introduces the Thunderball, Dream Number and Lotto draws(n)
